News

A View From Westminster, by Alberto Costa

Wednesday, 11 March, 2026
Restoring Parliament: Getting the Balance Right One of the biggest long-term decisions facing Parliament is what to do about the restoration of the Palace of Westminster. No one disputes that the building needs major work. It is a UNESCO World Heritage Site, a symbol of our democracy, and the place where our laws are debated and passed. But how we carry out those works matters enormously...
